programme.title: E105 - Barking Up the Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Sonic is shocked that the Boscage Maze 'Monster' is Amy AKA Thorn Rose. Wielding a Paradox Prism shard, Thorn wages war on the tree-dwelling Scavengers. Sonic must save these savage Shatter-Friends from each other to find a way home.

programme.title: E103 - Bummer School
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: E208 - iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: E512 - The Whole Bilsky Family
programme.desc: Henry's nerves are put the test when Piper invites her new boyfriend and his family over for dinner.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E113 - From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: E307 - Fandom Pains / Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. // After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: E701 - Waking History
programme.desc: Eager to uncover secrets from the past, Lisa uses her technology to wake up a frozen caveman.

programme.title: E102 - The Yoke's on You
programme.desc: Before the Prism Battle, Shadow and Sonic go head-to-head in an epic fight. In present-day New Yoke City, the Chaos Council discover Sonic's mysterious connection to their own coveted power source and plan to extract it by any means necessary.

programme.title: E332 - Karate Pals / Karen's Klatch
programme.desc: The gal pals become unstoppable after Sandy teaches them karate. Before long, the entire town has gotten in on the action. // Plankton infiltrates a party thrown by Karen for her computer friends, but Karen quickly uncovers his ruse.

programme.desc: In the first ever Blaze Musical, Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are on a daring quest to find the pieces of the Broken Key and unlock a secret treasure

programme.title: E306 - Baby Steel / Joke's On You
programme.desc: When Steel accidentally turns himself into a baby, he wreaks havoc on Platinum City. // It's the annual 'Day of Fun'! However when Ricardo and Trickalien play the ultimate prank on the Deer Squad, the day of fun soon turns into a day of chaos!

programme.title: E204 - We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Now there's more to explore with DORA! Join the iconic exploradora in amazing adventures with friends old and new as she journeys across the wacky and wonderful Rainforest with her best friend Boots by her side.

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E225 - The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E606 - Pups And The Stinky Bubble Trouble / Pups Save The Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. // Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E114 - The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E623 - Campfire Stories
programme.desc: It's a campout under the stars! Blaze, AJ, Starla, Crusher, and Pickle are gathered around the campfire to tell the most amazing stories they can make up! And the best part? Whoever tells the best story wins the last marshmallow!

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E107 - Epic Sail
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island! Blaze and his crew must find the missing pieces of their ship so they can sail home.

programme.title: E101 - The Mystery On The Monsoon Express
programme.desc: Animal detectives Sam and Kit collect all the clues while searching for the slithering suspect who bit an express train's engineer.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: Trump Vs. Netanyahu: Is The US Betraying Israel For A Deal With Iran?
programme.desc: Donald Trump negotiates a peace deal with Iran, leaving Benjamin Netanyahu on the sidelines. What would a potential agreement mean for Israel's security and the future of its alliance with the US? Our guests: Richard C. Schneider (Middle East expert), Emily Gordine (DW, Jerusalem), Hans-Jakob Schindler (security expert)

programme.title: Why Oil Won't Get Cheaper. The US-Iran Deal And The Price Of Everything
programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E4 - The Hauraki Gulf/ Te Moananui a Toi
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the teeming waters of the Hauraki Gulf, near Auckland, New Zealand, and explore a true paradise for ocean creatures. Catch a glimpse of a stealthy manta ray, enjoy dolphin antics, and admire a kaleidoscope of tropical fish.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E2 - Surviving the Flood
programme.desc: Track Molelo's pride, who are exhausted by cub care when the winter floods arrive. Check on the cheetah cubs, who make a difficult decision, and witness a scary encounter that makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.title: E2 - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Follow new graduate Beni, who gets an exciting introduction to jungle college alongside former classmates Sura, Meryl, and Wine. Check on new arrival Molly and join Dr. Nadine as she grades slowpoke Bumi and wild child Monita on their latest lessons.

programme.title: E3 - Hard Lessons
programme.desc: Shudder as food-obsessed Beni gets a dramatic, educational smackdown from the local dominant male, Petruk. See spoiled rich kid Spanser, a former illegal pet, try to tamp down his sweet tooth before roguish Bumi goes on a wild joyride with Greta.

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E10 - Dior Cruise/Chateau De Vault-De-Lugny
programme.desc: You can visit the Village Saint-Paul in the heart of the Marais. Dior Cruise offers a Scottish fashion stopover. Find out all about the French expression ''la goutte qui fait deborder le vase''. In Burgundy, the Chateau de Vault-de-Lugny combines ancient charm with modern comfort. programme.title: E9 - Paname Takes The Plunge
programme.desc: Paris was built around the Seine: its streets are numbered according to their position in relation to the river. Its coat of arms and motto, 'Fluctuat nec mergitur', refer to water. Immerse yourself in this major element of Parisian life.

The Last Supper
programme.desc: The early history of a nation unfolds through the actions of three heroes – Liu Bang, Xiang Yu and Han Xin – who chased their dreams of uniting a warring nation and fought through major milestones of the Chu-Han Contention years in the third century. From the Julu War to the Hongmen Banquet, the Gaixia War to the death of HanXin, the narration of Liu Bang – who would be the founding emperor of the new Han Dynasty – sets the stage for a tale of betrayal and brothers at war, where the last man standing inherits a nation.

programme.title: Unlimited Dad Love: Beyond The Sin
programme.desc: One rainy night, the dead body of a girl, the only daughter of Hong Kong police Yin Lok, is found in the wild. Polices based on clues, suspect has been identified. However, several more girls are murdered and murder cases keep happening. Yin begins to investigate his daughter's death and met a mentally retarded girls, he is looking for more clues from this special girl. Finally, Yin is getting closer to the truth...

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin II
programme.desc: During the second battle of the War to Resist U.S. Aggression and Aid Korea, the 9th Corps Command issues an order for the 7th Infantry Company to attack the Sumun Bridge. The 7th Company suffers a tough march to the Sumun Bridge. The soldiers are near their limits, every step forward in the midst of the harsh weather only means another great challenge to the body and mind...

programme.title: Cold War (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: Approaching midnight in Hong Kong, police headquarters receives an anonymous call: a police van carrying the advanced equipment and five officers has disappeared off the grid...

programme.title: Hit N Fun
programme.desc: “CHUNG LUI SOCIETY” is a boxing gym founded by the former legendary Muay Thai champion CHUNG Lui, who is dedicated to training professional fighters. Despite the gym's struggles, he remains committed to his lifelong philosophy of never backing down from a challenge. Businesswoman Elsa discovers that her boyfriend Daniel is cheating on her with Macau's female champion, Surewin. Driven by her competitive spirit, Elsa vows to settle their score in the ring. Upon learning that Surewin was Lui's former student, Elsa seeks him out to train her at his gym. Upon learning that Surewin was Lui's former student, Elsa seeks him out to train her at his gym. There, she encounters MOK Ka Lei, who had previously clashed with her during an advertisement shoot. After leaving the entertainment industry to support her family, Ka Lei attempts to make a comeback, with the help of her friend LAM Pik Chu. Under the rigorous training of Lui's protege, KO Chau, Elsa undergoes intense preparation. Alth

programme.title: You're My Favorite Song
programme.desc: Angel, a brilliant young girl, races to fulfill her dying grandfather's bucket list-starting with building a resort on their beachfront land. To succeed, she must outsmart powerful moguls trying to seize the property while enlisting her classmates' help to run the business in exchange for tutoring.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime Rpt
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: E62
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E62
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 佳佳蝦滑歡喜冤家崩潰大哭
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E9 - 佳佳蝦滑歡喜冤家崩潰大哭
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E11 - 謝娜胡靜魔音循環笑瘋
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: E3 - 王安宇張顏齊陷合格危機？
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: E9 - 佳佳蝦滑歡喜冤家崩潰大哭
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E3 - 王安宇張顏齊陷合格危機？
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: E9 - 00後求職小伙被職場整頓
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Beauty Water
programme.desc: Ye-ji comes across mysterious water that enables her to lose weight and reshape her appearance. She finds her life is more in danger the more she desires to be beautiful.

programme.title: Two Seasons Two Strangers
programme.desc: A screenwriter writes two stories about travelers making unexpected connections.

programme.desc: With the ordinary Nohara family, lives an ordinary dog, whose name is very ordinary, Shiro. The one thing that isn't ordinary? He's a superhero!

programme.title: E2 - Saucy Situations
programme.desc: Nicole and Alan scout locations for Greenios and have an investment meeting. Randi begins construction on a new part of the restaurant business.

programme.title: E1 - Two Households Both Alike
programme.desc: Chantel and Pedro attempt to move on as their divorce comes closer to finalising. Neither of them can help but reflect on their shared past.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: A new group of amateur chefs from all across Australia enter the MasterChef kitchen! Joining them on day one of the competition is guest chef Jamie Oliver.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The chefs cook for a place in the very first immunity challenge. Guest star Jamie Oliver challenges the chefs to create a delicious dish in just 15 minutes.

programme.title: E1 - Two Households Both Alike
programme.desc: Chantel and Pedro attempt to move on as their divorce comes closer to finalising. Neither of them can help but reflect on their shared past.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!

programme.title: E614 - Where The Pawn Stars Roam
programme.desc: When Rick reels in an antique glass fishing buoy made in Japan, he hopes the seller's price floats his boat. Meanwhile, Chum checks out a rare dinosaur fossil. Can he dig up a good price?

programme.title: E6 - The Marvelous World Of Disney
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers.

programme.title: Vat 69: Malaysia's Very Able Troopers
programme.desc: Trained by the British SAS, they were formed in 1969 to combat the resurgent Communists. Uncover the heroism and sacrifices of Malaysia's elite commandoes.

programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E6 - Bologna
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. He breaks open a fresh cheese wheel with Massimo Bottura and meets the niece of Federico Fellini.

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

Duel To The Death
programme.desc: The best swordsmen of China and Japan have made it a historical ritual to meet every 10 years for a showdown of fighting skills and powers. The leading fighter of the Japanese ninjas, Hashimoto, and the Chinese chief Ching Wan have come to respect each other after they met, but tradition demands that they lock swords. Their honor is put to the test when rogue ninjas barge into the battlefield...

programme.title: Great Pretenders
programme.desc: Taiwanese swindler Mr. Giant loses in a poker match against Hong Kong swindler Wong Sheung Chin and they become sworn enemies. Meanwhile, Wong's apprentice Snake Wai meets Susan, a widow whom recently returned to Hong Kong from Singapore. Planning to con a big sum of money from her, Wai sets up a plan with his acquaintances Yam Sei-sung and Yip Mei-mei. However, Susan turns out to be a swindler as well. Unable to salvage a fortune from Susan, Wai, Sung and Mei become indebted to her. In desperation, Wai seeks help from his mentor and he has won back all the debts they owed Susan...

programme.title: Great Pretenders

programme.title: Para Para Sakura
programme.desc: Phillip Wong, a colour-blind dance instructor who is devoted to the Japanese Para Para. He meets Yee, a spoiled rich girl and an attraction begins to form between the two...

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。
